title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
summary: OpenAI为美国Pro用户推出ChatGPT中的个人理财体验，允许安全连接金融账户，获取基于个人财务背景、目标和优先级的AI洞察与指导。
highlights: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S.
Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.
